scripts.dev:desktop: cd ledgerx/apps/desktop && npm run tauri dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:all-with-desktop: concurrently -n web,backend,desktop -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.db:migrate: echo 'Run your SQL migrations (e.g. alembic upgrade head)'
